title: Pickarang
description: A standalone port of the Pickarang from Vazkii's Quark mod. Throw it like a boomerang to mine blocks at range – it picks up dropped items and returns everything to your inventory!
body:
# ⛏️🪃 Pickarang

> 🔶 **Standalone port** — No Quark required!

> **A throwable boomerang-pickaxe that mines blocks at range, collects the drops, and returns to your hand!**

---

## 🎯 What is Pickarang?

The **Pickarang** is a diamond-tier tool that combines a **pickaxe** with a **boomerang**. Right-click to throw it — it flies forward, **breaks the first block** it hits, **picks up all nearby items**, and **returns everything straight to your inventory**.

No more walking to every block you mine. Just throw, catch, repeat.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🪃 **Throw & Return** — Flies out, hits a block, and comes right back
- ⛏️ **Mines Blocks** — Breaks blocks just like a pickaxe would
- 📦 **Collects Items** — Picks up all dropped items on the way back
- ✨ **Collects XP** — Experience orbs are grabbed too
- 🔧 **800 Durability** — Built to last, repairable at an anvil
- ⚔️ **3 Attack Damage** — Works as a melee weapon in a pinch
- 🎯 **Returns to Original Slot** — Always comes back exactly where it was

---

## 🛠️ Crafting Recipe


![Crafting Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/tJVJY0t.png)


---

## 📋 Requirements for Fabric Version

| Dependency | Version |
|------------|---------|
| Minecraft | **1.21.8** |
| Fabric Loader | ≥ 0.16.1 |
| Fabric API | Required |

## 📋 Requirements for NeoForge Version

| Dependency | Version |
|------------|---------|
| Minecraft | **26.1.2** |
| NeoForge | ≥ 26.1.2.59-beta | 

(That is the NeoForge version I tested, may work on more tho..)

---

## 📜 Credits & License

This mod is a **standalone port** inspired by the Pickarang feature from the [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) mod.

- **Original concept & design** — [Vazkii](https://github.com/Vazkii) / [Violet Moon](https://github.com/VazkiiMods)
- **Pickarang port** — [nicomods](https://modrinth.com/user/nicomods)

Licensed under **[CC BY-NC-SA 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/3.0/)**, consistent with the original Quark license.

---

*Throw smarter, not harder.* 🪃
